content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence aaa and its first nnn elements.

The iii-th element of the sequence, where i>ni > ni>n is generated by the following formula.

The iii-th element i>ni > ni>n would be the floor of the mean of the last nnn elements of the sequence. Formally,

ai=РїіРѕЉk=0nРѕњ1aiРѕњn+knРїІa_i = \left\lfloor \frac{\sum_{k=0}^{n-1} a_{i-n+k}}{n} \right\rflooraiРђІ=РїіnРѕЉk=0nРѕњ1РђІaiРѕњn+kРђІРђІРїІ

For example,

an+1=Рїіa1+a2+РІ»+annРїІa_{n+1} = \left\lfloor \frac{a_1 + a_2 + \dots + a_{n}}{n} \right\rflooran+1РђІ=Рїіna1РђІ+a2РђІ+РІ»+anРђІРђІРїІ
an+2=Рїіa2+a3+РІ»+an+1nРїІa_{n+2} = \left\lfloor \frac{a_2 + a_3 + \dots + a_{n+1}}{n} \right\rflooran+2РђІ=Рїіna2РђІ+a3РђІ+РІ»+an+1РђІРђІРїІ
an+3=Рїіa3+a4+РІ»+an+2nРїІa_{n+3} = \left\lfloor \frac{a_3 + a_4 + \dots + a_{n+2}}{n} \right\rflooran+3РђІ=Рїіna3РђІ+a4РђІ+РІ»+an+2РђІРђІРїІ

You have to answer many queries in which you would be asked to tell some xxx-th element of the sequence, where xxx would be provided in the query.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
First line of each test case contains an integer nnn.
The second line of each test case contains nnn space-separated integers where the iii-th integer denotes the value of aia_iaiРђІ.
The third line contains an integer QQQ denoting the number of queries.
Each of the next QQQ lines contains an integer xxx, denoting that you should tell what's the xxx-th element of the sequence.


Output Format
For each query, output an integer denoting the value of the corresponding element of the sequence.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The 4th element of the array would be Рїі2+2+33РїІ=Рїі73РїІ=2\left\lfloor \frac{2+2+3}{3} \right\rfloor = \left\lfloor \frac{7}{3} \right\rfloor = 2Рїі32+2+3РђІРїІ=Рїі37РђІРїІ=2
